prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation on benzene was performed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The total electronic energy is approximately -6322.2183 eV, with the HOMO at -7.0468329 eV and the LUMO at -0.41574728 eV. The HOMO-LUMO gap is about 6.63 eV. The SCF convergence was achieved in 8 cycles, and all checks are trustworthy with no issues detected. The method used was B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF.
